title: Fast Fiction Factory Ambiguous Routing Resolution

review_memory_checked.prior_signal_summary: The quality audit classified 7 ambiguous routing rows but did not record user acceptance of final routing policy.
review_memory_checked.what_changed: The 7 ambiguous rows now have primary destination rules, secondary route roles, hold reasons, and regression checks; the local visual asset row no longer routes to Claim Ledger.
review_memory_checked.what_this_review_decides: No user review is required now; this slice records deterministic routing policy and regression checks for the ambiguous rows.
not_asking: repeat review of source-span quality counts
canon decisions for Toma fate, brass moth truth, or Council motive
review_memory_checked.next_nonredundant_axis: one missing fixture class or a validator hardening case for route policy drift

destination_policy.visual_asset: route_to_visual_asset through Profile/Ghost and optional Timeline context; never carry Claim target ids in deterministic adapter output.
destination_policy.human_owned_object: route_to_profile_candidate first; Claim and Timeline are secondary evidence surfaces while unresolved_decision keeps final meaning held.
destination_policy.unresolved_decision: hold_for_human_decision first; Claim or Timeline may preserve review context but cannot become adoption surfaces.
destination_policy.source_reference: No ambiguous source_reference rows were present; source refs remain support evidence only.
destination_policy.reject_or_ignore: No ambiguous rows were rejected or ignored; all remain visible and review-held.

decisions.source_span: brass moth in the workshop drawer
decisions.destination_rule: Object candidates with unresolved brass moth truth route first to Profile/Ghost; Claim and Timeline remain evidence surfaces only while unresolved_decision keeps the truth decision held.
decisions.hold_reason: Human-owned dependency remains unresolved: brass moth truth.
decisions.guard_condition: Must remain hold, must keep brass moth truth as unresolved dependency, must include unresolved_decision route, and must not suggest adopt.

decisions.source_span: still rings at noon even though its bell was removed
decisions.destination_rule: Visual asset rows route through Profile/Ghost plus Timeline for review context, and must not target Claim Ledger directly or carry targetClaimIds.
decisions.hold_reason: Visual route is held as review evidence and not release artwork.
decisions.guard_condition: Must remain hold, targetDestinations must exclude claim, targetClaimIds must be empty, and Visual remains a review label only.

decisions.destination_rule: Unresolved Council motive rows route first to Human Review; Claim and Timeline are evidence/readback surfaces, not adoption targets.
decisions.hold_reason: Human-owned dependency remains unresolved: Council motive.
decisions.guard_condition: Must remain hold, must include unresolved_decision, must include Council motive dependency, and must keep human review source ref.

decisions.source_span: The brass moth flickers like a warning
decisions.destination_rule: Warning-style brass moth object rows route first to Profile/Ghost; Claim/Timeline may preserve evidence but truth remains held.
decisions.hold_reason: Human-owned dependency remains unresolved: brass moth truth.
decisions.guard_condition: Must remain hold, must keep brass moth truth dependency, must include unresolved_decision route, and must not decide proof/bait/false-record meaning.

decisions.destination_rule: Unresolved Council motive rows route first to Human Review; Claim is only a held open-question record.
decisions.hold_reason: Human-owned dependency remains unresolved: Council motive.
decisions.guard_condition: Must remain hold, must include unresolved_decision, must include Council motive dependency, and must keep human review source ref.

decisions.destination_rule: Short brass moth key object rows route first to Profile/Ghost; Claim/Timeline are allowed only as held evidence because function remains undecided.
decisions.hold_reason: Human-owned dependency remains unresolved: brass moth truth.
decisions.guard_condition: Must remain hold, must keep brass moth truth dependency, must include unresolved_decision route, and must not infer key function.

decisions.destination_rule: Unresolved Toma fate rows route first to Human Review; Timeline is a held placement cue until fate is chosen by the human author.
decisions.hold_reason: Human-owned dependency remains unresolved: Toma fate.
decisions.guard_condition: Must remain hold, must include unresolved_decision, must include Toma fate dependency, and must keep human review source ref.
